morning.title: eMarketer: chatbots like ChatGPT and Google AI Mode will generate less than $1B in ad revenue in 2026
morning.summary: Chatbots are expected to generate less than $1B in ad revenue in 2026, according to eMarketer.

morning.title: Google agrees to buy 100% of the initial output from the Steel River Energy Center's 1.6GW solar project in Arkansas
morning.summary: Google has agreed to purchase the entire initial output of a 1.6GW solar project in Arkansas.

morning.title: Researchers detail "context bombing", where defenders use prompt injections to trigger guardrails of attackers' LLMs
morning.summary: Researchers have discovered a method called "context bombing" to defend against LLM-based attacks.

morning.title: IBM acquires Red Hat
morning.summary: IBM has acquired Red Hat to create a leading hybrid cloud provider.

morning.title: Apple sues OpenAI after ex-engineer allegedly used bug to steal trade secrets
morning.summary: Apple is suing OpenAI over allegations that an ex-engineer used a bug to steal trade secrets.

morning.title: 57% of enterprises have watched AI agents be confidently wrong. The fix is an agentic context layer, but who has one?
morning.summary: Most enterprises have experienced AI agents providing incorrect information with confidence, and a fix is needed.

morning.title: ACRouter picks the smartest AI model per task, beating Opus-only setups by 2.6x on cost
morning.summary: ACRouter can select the most cost-effective AI model for a given task, outperforming Opus-only setups.

morning.title: The US Approves the Launch of a Mirror Satellite That Can Reflect Sunlight and Illuminate the Earth at Night
morning.summary: The US has approved the launch of a mirror satellite capable of reflecting sunlight to illuminate the Earth at night.

morning.title: PsiQuantum has a plan to make a massive quantum computer out of light
morning.summary: PsiQuantum plans to develop a massive quantum computer using light.

morning.title: DeepSeek cut prices 75%. The 100x problem remains
morning.summary: DeepSeek has reduced its prices by 75%, but the 100x problem persists.
